body_txt: Sometimes, authors give their characters related names. While Theme Naming adds a sense of unity or cohesiveness to the work, it doesn't always make much sense in-universe. Family Theme Naming is when the names of related characters follow a pattern or fall into a category. Somewhere along the line, a character would have had to make the decision to name his or her children something that resulted in Theme Naming. This could result in similarly named siblings or span the entire family tree. A Sub-Trope of Theme Naming . Theme Twin Naming is a subtrope, and so is Alliterative Family , and commonly employs The Runt at the End as an exception. Related to Couple Theme Naming , where a pair of love interests are given a theme naming.
